scripts.dev: nub run build && nub run --filter @genui/playground dev
scripts.eval: nub run build && nub run --filter @genui/playground eval
scripts.test: nub run build && nub run --recursive test
scripts.check: nub run build && nub run format:check && nub run --recursive check && nub run test:pack
scripts.typecheck: nub run build && nub run --recursive typecheck
scripts.format: oxfmt *.json .*.json scripts packages/runtime/*.json packages/runtime/src examples/playground/*.json examples/playground/src examples/playground/scripts
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check *.json .*.json scripts packages/runtime/*.json packages/runtime/src examples/playground/*.json examples/playground/src examples/playground/scripts
